title: Affirm Holdings (AFRM) Earnings Analysis - Expected to Beat Estimates
text:
Affirm Holdings (AFRM) Earnings Analysis

Published: August 21, 2024

Key Details

Earnings Report Date: August 28, 2024

Consensus Estimates:
- EPS: Loss of $0.45 per share (34.8% improvement year-over-year)
- Revenue: $599.5 million (34.5% growth year-over-year)

Positive Indicators for Earnings Beat

The analysis indicates strong likelihood of beating expectations:

- Earnings ESP: +19.64% (Most Accurate Estimate exceeds consensus)
- Zacks Rank: #3 (Hold)
- Track Record: Beat estimates in 2 of last 4 quarters; previous quarter delivered "+38.57%" surprise

The article notes that "stocks with this combination produce a positive surprise nearly 70% of the time," referring to positive ESP combined with a Zacks Rank of 1-3.

Investment Perspective

According to the analysis, the combination of positive Earnings ESP and the company's rank suggests Affirm "will most likely beat the consensus EPS estimate." However, investors should consider that earnings beats alone don't guarantee stock price increases—other business factors and market conditions matter significantly.
